label.purpose: Table headers and compact metadata labels.

mono.purpose: Trace ids, raw previews, timestamps, and code-shaped values.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Short hover, focus, tab, and selected-state transitions only.

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Compact top navigation link for monitor pages.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 16px; border-radius: 4px; color: #9d9d9d; font: 400 14px/1.5 'Noto Sans JP', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; background: transparent; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #2d2d30; color: #d4d4d4; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4daafc; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-link[aria-current='page'] { background: #2d2d30; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Selected Tab
components.description: TraceDetail tab control with underline selection.
components.css: .ds-tab { appearance: none; background: transparent; border: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; padding: 8px 16px; color: #9d9d9d; font: 400 14px/1.5 'Noto Sans JP', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #d4d4d4; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4daafc; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-tab[aria-selected='true'] { color: #ffffff; border-bottom-color: #4daafc; }

components.name: Panel Container
components.description: Flat tonal panel used for readiness, cache groups, and grouped diagnostics.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #252526; color: #d4d4d4; border: 1px solid #2b2b2b; border-radius: 6px; padding: 16px 24px; font: 400 14px/1.5 'Noto Sans JP', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel h3 { margin: 0 0 8px; color: #ffffff; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.25; font-weight: 600; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; }

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Dense evidence table row with hover state and muted metadata labels.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; color: #d4d4d4; font: 400 14px/1.5 'Noto Sans JP', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-table th, .ds-table td { padding: 8px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2b2b2b; text-align: left; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table th { background: #2d2d30; color: #9d9d9d; font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .03em; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: #2a2d2e; }

components.name: Row Toggle Button
components.description: Small disclosure button for trace-list progressive detail rows.
components.css: .ds-row-toggle { appearance: none; width: 1.6rem; height: 1.6rem; background: #2d2d30; border: 1px solid #3c3c3c; border-radius: 4px; color: #d4d4d4; font: 400 14px/1 'Noto Sans JP', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-row-toggle:hover { background: #2a2d2e; } .ds-row-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4daafc; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: This design system is a local observability control room for agent workflows. It should feel close to Grafana in information density and operational scanability, but grounded in the current Local Ingestion Monitor posture: VS Code Dark+, vendored assets, no CDN, and a trusted single-user loopback workflow.
keyCharacteristics: VS Code dark surfaces with one primary blue accent.
Grafana-like operational confidence without neon monitoring decoration.
Raw/sanitized boundaries visible in structure, not hidden in copy.
All runtime assets local and offline-safe.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Command Blue is for action, selection, and focus. Do not add decorative accent colors to inactive surfaces.

rules.name: The Boundary Color Rule
rules.body: Raw-bearing areas use inset surfaces and muted text. Sanitized dashboard views use normal panel/table surfaces. The data boundary must be visible through layout and surface treatment.

rules.name: The No Display Type Rule
rules.body: This is a developer tool. Do not use oversized display headlines, decorative typefaces, or fluid hero typography.

rules.name: The Tonal Layer Rule
rules.body: Use panel, panel-raised, and inset to create hierarchy. Do not add wide decorative shadows to tables, controls, or cards.

dos: Do preserve the current VS Code Dark+ base tokens unless a source-of-truth spec changes.
Do keep Grafana-like density: compact panels, tables, tabs, status text, and direct metric labels.
Do make sanitized views and raw-bearing sections structurally distinct.
Do keep focus visible and keyboard controls standard.
Do use vendored local assets only for Local Monitor runtime UI.
Do use progressive disclosure when a table has more columns than the primary task can scan.
donts: Don't turn this into a Copilot adoption, billing, productivity, ranking, or employee-monitoring dashboard.
Don't show raw prompt, response, tool arguments, tool results, source fragments, credentials, or sensitive paths in repository-safe outputs, static dashboards, logs, or GitHub Pages snapshots.
Don't copy VS Code Agent Debug / Chat Debug View or use VS Code internal logs, workspaceStorage, or chatSessions as inputs.
Don't apply DADS styling to the Local Monitor.
Don't use marketing hero sections, decorative card grids, gradient text, glass panels, neon dark-mode accents, or hero-stat layouts.
Don't add broad shadows, 32px+ card radii, colored side-stripe borders, or decorative animation.
Don't add CDN fonts, CDN graph libraries, or a frontend build step to the Local Monitor.
